noJsonComponentResolution.evidence: 7 tests passed. Forbidden patterns defined (3). isJsonComponentPath, validateComponentPath, isSingleFileReference all correctly detect/block .json paths.

deterministicComponentLoading.evidence: 15 tests passed. Component registry booted with 5 components. All aliases resolve correctly. extractComponentName works for both index-based and name-based paths. isDirectoryBased correctly validates paths.

whiteScreenRiskEliminated.evidence: 9 tests passed. Safe render provides fallback trees (getSafeRenderTree, getMinimalRenderTree). checkComponentSafety detects .json paths and returns fallback. generateSafePageData returns safe tree on critical failure. Component fallback hierarchy (critical vs non-critical) defined.

registryDrivenSystem.evidence: 6 tests passed. 5 components registered. getAllowedComponentPaths returns all paths. validatePageComponents validates/converts page component configs. Violation logging works.

buildStable.evidence: 2 tests passed. build-time validation script (scripts/validate-components.js) verifies 4 checks with 18 pass results. celebration-modal converted from name-based to index-based. All 26 component references verified.
